input.headline: Advocacy groups urge parents to avoid AI toys this holiday season

raw.headline: Advocacy groups urge parents to avoid AI toys this holiday season

winner: Why did the toy maker get a restraining order against advocacy groups this holiday season? Because they kept insisting on playing "Parents off AI"!

candidates.text: A child asked Santa for an AI toy this year. Upon hearing this, local advocacy groups sighed collectively and said, "Another season spent teaching Alexa about the alphabet.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific, with a clever twist on AI toys and Santa's list."}

candidates.text: Parents urged to steer clear of AI elves that demand presents instead of helping with them.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on AI toys, specific and concise with a playful tone."}

candidates.text: Why did the toy robot get sent back to the factory? Because its manufacturer thought it was a perfect gift for any child - AI-dependent!
